events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`. Summary: forms observed without release agent applied is a fail — it's an installed-defective/non-compliant condition per ACI 347 form-preparation requirements, posing medium risk of bonding, tearing, and spalling on strip if concrete were placed now. Corrective action is to apply release agent and re-inspect before releasing the placement hold point.
